updateModal.step1: 1. Clear quarantine on the downloaded file:
updateModal.step2: 2. Open the file and install Natively.
updateModal.step3: 3. Clear quarantine on the installed app:

updateModal.appDamagedAction: Move app to Applications folder, then run:
updateModal.fallbackNotes: Includes performance improvements and bug fixes.

about.title: About Natively
about.tagline: Designed to be invisible, intelligent, and trusted.
about.modesManagerDescription: Seven specialized AI personas — Interview, Sales, Recruiting, Team Meet, Lecture, Technical, and General. Each mode injects a tailored system prompt, reference files, and smart note sections into every response.
about.customContextDescription: A free-form textarea in Profile Intelligence lets you inject any personal context — sales stats, product notes, LeetCode patterns, preferences — into every AI call as a structured block. Auto-saves as you type.
about.realTimeProDescription: Pro feature gates (Modes, Profile Intelligence) now update instantly when you activate or deactivate a license — no restart needed. Active mode is automatically cleared on license loss.
about.sttStabilityDescription: Deepgram reconnect storms are now prevented via exponential backoff and connection staggering. Server-side key pooling supports up to 6 Deepgram and ElevenLabs keys with automatic rotation on failure.
about.hybridIntelligenceDescription: Seamlessly routes queries between ultra-fast models for instant speed and reasoning models (Gemini, OpenAI, Claude) for complex tasks. Powered by enterprise-grade speech recognition from 7+ providers.
about.localRagDescription: A purely local vector memory system allows Natively to recall details from past meetings. Embeddings and retrieval happen on-device via SQLite for maximum privacy.
about.stealthControlDescription: Features "Undetectable Mode" to hide from the dock and "Masquerading" to disguise as system apps. You control exactly what data leaves your device.
about.noRecordingDescription: Natively listens only when active. It does not record video, take arbitrary screenshots without command, or perform background surveillance.
about.creator: Creator
about.founderBio1: I build software that stays out of the way.
about.founderBio2: is made to feel fast, quiet, and respectful of your privacy.
about.starOnGithubDescription: Love Natively? Support us by starring the repo.
about.reportIssueDescription: Found a bug? Let us know so we can fix it.
about.getInTouchDescription: Open for professional collaborations and job offers.
